11 Oct 2017

It’s not all sunshine and orchids in paradise. Somebody cut the fuel fill line on our rental and siphoned our gas while we were parked at the beach. Avis sent a truck to tow the Jeep and us back to the airport to get a replacement. The tow truck driver, John, was great though.
